name: BlackRock
description: World's largest asset manager, with more than $10 trillion in assets under management. Notable in the RWA sector for issuing BUIDL, a tokenised institutional USD digital liquidity fund distributed via Securitize and held with Bank of New York Mellon.
complianceObligations: BUIDL is offered under SEC Rule 144A and Section 3(c)(7), restricted to qualified purchasers, with KYC handled by Securitize.

name: Franklin Templeton
description: Global investment management firm with approximately $1.5 trillion in assets under management. Among the first traditional finance institutions to tokenise a regulated US government money-market fund, recorded on-chain as BENJI across Stellar, Polygon, and additional networks.
complianceObligations: Access is provided through dedicated investor channels, with ownership records maintained through the applicable transfer-agent framework and a blockchain-integrated recordkeeping system.

name: Paxos
description: NYDFS-chartered trust company building regulated digital-asset infrastructure. Issues PAX Gold (PAXG), a token backed 1:1 by LBMA Good Delivery physical gold, alongside the USDP stablecoin and tokenisation rails for partner institutions.
complianceObligations: Paxos operates under an NYDFS Trust Charter; KYC is required for large redemptions.

name: Janus Henderson
description: Active global investment manager with around $350 billion in assets under management. Partners with Anemoy on Centrifuge to issue JTRSY and JAAA, bringing US Treasury bills and AAA-rated CLO tranches on-chain for institutional investors.
complianceObligations: Janus Henderson is an SEC-registered investment adviser and FCA-regulated; tokenised products are restricted to non-US institutional investors.

name: WisdomTree
description: ETF issuer with over $100 billion in assets under management. Operates WisdomTree Prime, a multi-chain digital-assets platform that tokenises commodity-backed products (WTGOLD, WTSILV) and a government money-market fund (WTGXX).
complianceObligations: WisdomTree is an SEC-registered investment adviser and FINRA member; tokenised products require KYC.

name: Apollo Global Management
description: Alternative asset manager with more than $650 billion in assets under management. Issues ACRED, a tokenised feeder share of its Diversified Credit Fund distributed via Securitize on Ethereum and Avalanche, expanding access to private credit for accredited investors.
complianceObligations: Apollo Global Management is an SEC-registered investment adviser and FINRA member; ACRED is restricted to accredited investors with KYC handled by Securitize.

name: KKR
description: Global investment firm managing over $550 billion in assets across private equity, credit, and infrastructure. Tokenises limited-partner interests in its Health Care Strategic Growth Fund II as SKHC on Avalanche via Securitize, opening institutional alternatives to qualified investors.
complianceObligations: KKR is an SEC-registered investment adviser; SKHC is restricted to qualified purchasers with KYC handled by Securitize.

name: Hamilton Lane
description: Private-markets investment manager overseeing more than $900 billion in client assets. Tokenises its Senior Credit Opportunities Fund as SCOPE via Securitize, lowering the entry threshold for accredited investors compared with traditional private-fund commitments.
complianceObligations: Hamilton Lane is an SEC-registered investment adviser; SCOPE is restricted to accredited investors with KYC handled by Securitize.

name: ChinaAMC
description: Chinese asset manager with over $300 billion in assets under management. Through its MAS-licensed Singapore subsidiary, issues CUMIU, a regulated tokenised USD money-market fund, on Ethereum in partnership with Libeara.
complianceObligations: ChinaAMC operates through a MAS-licensed Singapore subsidiary; CUMIU is restricted to institutional investors and requires KYC.

name: Standard Chartered
description: International bank and financial-services group headquartered in London, with operations spanning Asia, Africa, and the Middle East. Operates Libeara, its MAS-licensed digital-assets subsidiary that tokenises regulated funds for institutional managers such as ChinaAMC.
complianceObligations: Standard Chartered is MAS-licensed through its Libeara subsidiary and FCA-regulated; all products require institutional-grade KYC.

name: Amundi
description: European asset manager based in France with around $2.2 trillion in assets under management. Partners with Spiko to issue tokenised UCITS-compliant overnight swap funds in both euro (eurSAFO) and US dollar (SAFO) denominations.
complianceObligations: Amundi is AMF-regulated and its tokenised products are UCITS-compliant and SFDR-compliant; KYC is required through Spiko.

name: Aberdeen
description: UK asset manager with over $500 billion in assets under management, renamed from abrdn plc to Aberdeen Group plc in March 2025. Issues AMMF, a tokenised sterling money-market fund, through FCA-regulated digital-asset exchange Archax on Hedera.
complianceObligations: Aberdeen is an FCA-regulated UK asset manager; AMMF requires full KYC and is restricted to institutional investors.

name: Tether
description: Issuer of USDT and the gold-backed XAUT token. Reserves held with regulated custodians.
complianceObligations: KYC is required for direct issuance and redemption; secondary market trading requires no KYC.
